message:
feat: tier-based scrollback eviction under memory pressure (wa-3r5e)

ScrollbackEvictor computes per-pane segment limits from PaneTier ×
MemoryPressureTier, then delegates deletion to a SegmentStore trait.
Active panes keep full scrollback; idle/dormant panes are trimmed
progressively; Red pressure caps all panes at emergency limits.

25 tests covering config, planning, execution, error handling, and
property-based invariants (tier ordering, pressure monotonicity,
no over-eviction, idempotency).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
